errors.description: All required CI workflow evidence is visible, current, and successful.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive merge-authority evidence.

errors.description: Only part of the required CI workflow evidence is visible.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Partial workflow visibility cannot authorize dependency merges.

errors.description: Required CI workflow evidence is bound to stale or superseded PR lineage.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Stale CI evidence can authorize the wrong dependency revision.

errors.description: Required CI workflow evidence is still pending, queued, or in progress.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Delayed workflow propagation cannot be treated as successful validation.

errors.description: Required CI workflow evidence is missing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Missing contexts are failed checks under USBAY governance.

errors.description: CI workflow evidence or mergeability metadata is contradictory.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Contradictory CI state requires human governance review.

errors.description: CI workflow evidence failed or cannot be normalized safely.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Failed or unsafe CI evidence blocks merge authority.

errors.description: Dependency PR is superseded by newer dependency lineage.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Superseded dependency PRs must not be merged.

errors.description: Canonical CI status normalization denied merge authority.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Dependency merge is blocked until required CI evidence is verified.

errors.description: CI workflow evidence is still within a bounded propagation reconciliation window.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Pending propagation cannot authorize merge until required workflows converge.

errors.description: CI workflow propagation did not converge within the bounded reconciliation window.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Timed-out propagation remains unverifiable and blocks merge authority.

errors.description: Only part of the expected workflow fan-out is visible during reconciliation.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Incomplete workflow fan-out can hide missing required checks.

errors.description: Bounded CI propagation reconciliation converged to verified required checks.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive reconciliation evidence.

errors.description: Bounded CI propagation reconciliation denied merge authority.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Merge remains blocked when CI reconciliation is missing, stale, partial, contradictory, failed, or timed out.
